ops.text: SHIPPED + LIVE. cc-steer main green at 8f454616 (5 scoped commits: retrain frame machinery w/ review-fixed authoritative-first negative draw, watcher outcomes+WSR, labeling package, export legacy fix, Linux-ty conformance follow-up — macOS ty was blind to all 6 errors, docker Linux gate now the pre-push check). spawnllm passthrough shipped. v0.19.0 tagged + on PyPI. Review verdict: 1 confirmed major (uniform negative draw dropped authoritative negatives — fixed + 2 pinned tests), 1 contested minor (resolve_model generator stays; dict.get fails ty), 3 killed. Stack rebased over operator commits incl 81b123b (PROMPT_VERSION 6→7): E44 venv pinned to b067ed3c (v6) — remainder pass unblocked; E41 approved option B (reconstructed v6 prompt module, teacher judge@v6 5756 rows). E41 correction: divergence recurred WITH grad_checkpoint (memory hypothesis falsified) → real cause LR 2e-4 overshoot; approved warmup+cosine @ peak 1e-4 + optional native grad-clip, mirrored into lora_full.yaml. Deep-mine DONE in 22min: 5156 new detector events / 9356 files, 1191 random negatives; hard_negative=0 structural (needs fable verdicts). E44 universe ext: gate-negatives BLOCKED on triage FK (dedup_key REFERENCES feedback_events) — DEFERRED negative screening by decision (structural + emergent hard negatives suffice for frame v1); detector-fires universe proceeding. LIVE FLIP DONE: live.toml mode=live_all, plist pinned cc-steer[gate,mlx]==0.19.0 + --gate-threshold 0.914 (~2 fires/100 from 1d's live-score calibration), daemon bootstrapped (startup log confirms threshold 0.9140 live_all), holdout_frac 0.5 intact as the causal A/B engine. Outcomes seeded: 424/424 scored moments resolved (27 sessions) — fired 0, steered 317; scored_outcomes now the fire↔outcome WSR feed. E44 gap final (n=582 pairs): binary κ .837 [.786,.883], raw .931; category κ .804, raw .854; top flips operational_directive↔direction, new_task→direction; 85 adjudication rows staged.
